description: Running 'pnpm --filter @cotulenh/web run check-types' fails because tsconfig.json includes .next/types/**/*.ts entries that reference missing generated files such as .next/types/app/(app)/dashboard/page.ts and other route/typegen outputs. Reproduce from repo root, align next typegen output with tsconfig include patterns, and make check-types pass reliably in a clean workspace.

close_reason: Completed: removed all remaining app svelte-check warnings

Clean these up so typecheck is warning-free.

Add end-to-end coverage for create open challenge -> appears in lobby -> accept challenge -> both players navigate to the game page, and update the story status once that passes.

description: Add a structured reading/review plan based on docs/cotulenh-rules.md, covering normal movement, capture types, terrain and blocking, every piece and mechanic, plus a 10-question comprehension set with answers fully inferable from the rules docs.

description: Playwright invite-link verification logs a Svelte SSR warning that a <button> is nested inside another <button> in bits-ui floating-layer anchor output. This does not block invite-link flows, but it can cause hydration mismatch and content shift during SSR. Investigate the offending app-shell/popover trigger composition and remove the invalid button nesting.
title: Fix nested button SSR hydration warning in app shell

description: Story 3.8 still lacks Deno-level validate-move tests that exercise rematch_offer/rematch_accept/rematch_decline flows against the edge-function handler or extracted server logic. Add coverage for offer on ended game, accept creating rematch with swapped colors, decline clearing pending_action, active-game rejection, duplicate offer rejection, expired-offer rejection, and own-offer accept rejection.
title: Add validate-move rematch integration tests

description: Fix remaining Story 1.1 review gaps: wire semantic design tokens into the live theme, enforce 0px radius in shipped primitives, remove the barrel export alias, and narrow Supabase cookie-write error suppression.
title: Apply Story 1.1 follow-up review fixes

description: Code review on Story 3.9 found two concrete regressions in the reconnect/disconnect implementation: (1) reconnect restore currently falls back to connected state when the authoritative snapshot fetch fails, which can re-enable stale local gameplay after a disconnect; (2) disconnect-forfeit outcomes are not rendered with a disconnect-specific result reason in the game result banner, so timeout victories/losses can show the wrong reason text. Patch the reconnect state machine, add focused tests, and land the UI/result mapping fix.
title: Fix story 3.9 review regressions in reconnect restore and timeout result UX

close_reason: Updated AGENTS.md to remove deprecated bd sync usage and document current bd prime / bd dolt remote workflow
description: Pulling from Dolt remote... and Pushing to Dolt remote... currently fail in this repository with: remote 'origin' not found. Configure or document the expected Dolt remote so the AGENTS.md sync workflow can complete successfully.
title: Configure bd Dolt remote for repo sync

close_reason: Unblocked lobby browser E2E by running the app against local Supabase credentials instead of the dead remote host.
description: Browser-level lobby E2E for Story 4.1 is blocked in this workspace because the app's Node runtime cannot resolve the configured Supabase host (ptdhkasagsfubnjnatjp.supabase.co). Evidence: the local SvelteKit dev server returns generic auth/register failures, and Vite logs show getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND from Supabase auth calls. Browser-only network works, but server-side load/actions cannot reach Supabase, so real /play/online browser automation is blocked until Node-side DNS/network access is restored. Link this blocker to the remaining Story 4.1 E2E task.
title: Restore Node DNS/network access to Supabase for app E2E runs

description: Running 'pnpm --filter @cotulenh/web run build' fails in apps/cotulenh/web/src/app/(public)/learn/[subject]/[id]/page.tsx because next/dynamic is used with { ssr: false } in a Server Component. Move the dynamic import behind a Client Component boundary or otherwise restructure the lesson page so Next.js 15 build succeeds.
title: Fix learn lesson page build failure from dynamic ssr:false in server component

description: Story 3.8 rematch flow review follow-ups are implemented and landed, but _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/3-8-rematch-flow.md and sprint-status.yaml still show status review. Update the BMAD artifacts to done, then close the task.
title: Finalize Story 3.8 BMAD status after review pass

description: Story 3.9 implementation adds disconnect tracking, reconnect restoration, and a cron-driven disconnect forfeit flow, but the new SQL/RPC path still lacks dedicated automated verification of forfeit timing, simultaneous disconnect arbitration, and page-level timeout UX beyond the targeted client/core tests. Add focused automated coverage for the DB/RPC/cron semantics and end-to-end timeout surfacing.
title: Add deeper automated coverage for disconnect forfeit path

Current mismatches called out in docs/cotulenh-rules.md include artillery movement wording, tank blocking/capture wording, air force terrain summaries, and heroic commander wording. close_reason: Completed: fixed baseline check-types errors and verified pnpm check-types + app tests pass
title: Fix @cotulenh/app check-types baseline errors

description: Create a repo-local wrapper command for local Supabase status, psql, migrations, and app Playwright/dev flows. Document in AGENTS.md that agents should use this wrapper and request a persisted prefix approval for it instead of repeatedly approving ad hoc local Supabase commands.
title: Add local Supabase safe wrapper for agent workflows

description: Friends page E2E debugging on story 5.2 found local databases can end up with stale public.profiles schema even when supabase_migrations marks version 018 as applied. In the failing local setup, profiles.rating and profiles.username were missing, causing browser queries like select(id, display_name, rating) to fail with 400s and incoming friend requests to render empty. Applying 018 locally restored rating; applying 024 then exposed duplicate usernames and a stale handle_new_user() trigger. We manually repaired the local DB by deduping usernames, recreating idx_profiles_username, and recreating handle_new_user() to populate username, but none of that is codified in repo. Add a forward-only migration or local environment repair workflow that safely reconciles stale profiles schema and trigger state for existing developer databases, and add verification steps so friends/profile flows do not silently fail locally.
title: Reconcile local Supabase profiles schema drift after migrations 018 and 024

description: Story 4.1 still misses AC6 on first page load. The lobby skeleton only appears during invalidate/refresh flows; +page.svelte clears lobbyLoading in onMount before users ever see the loading state. Add a real initial-load skeleton path for the /play open challenges list and update the story once verified.
title: Restore true initial-load skeleton for open challenges lobby

description: Address review findings for Story 4.3: make auto-friend truly non-blocking in acceptInviteLink, surface invite-accept errors in the invite page UI, and tighten invite-link E2E coverage to verify signup redirect, friendship creation, and Vietnamese-only copy expectations.
title: Fix Story 4.3 invite-link review regressions

description: Break follow-up work from docs/cotulenh-rules.md and docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md into implementation beads. Use the rules reference as the source of truth for engine-aligned learn content, section 10/Game-State Rules coverage, complex-mechanic examples, and advanced assessment material so docs, learn content, and verification assets stay aligned.
title: Operationalize CotuLenh rules docs into curriculum and validation assets

description: Implement the rules-doc follow-up to add concrete example material for the hardest mechanics called out in docs/cotulenh-rules.md. Cover heavy bridge crossing, air-defense pathing outcomes, recombine during deploy, and commander exposure versus direct check. The output can be lesson examples, diagrams, test fixtures, or reusable docs assets, but it should make these mechanics teachable and regression-testable.
title: Add worked examples for CotuLenh complex rules interactions

description: Implement the Suggested Next Step from docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md by adding a second question set based on concrete FEN positions. Each item should ask the learner to classify outcomes such as legal move, illegal move, legal capture, illegal capture, legal combine, illegal combine, legal deploy, illegal deploy, check, and commander danger without check, using the rules reference as the answer source.
title: Add FEN-based advanced assessment set to the CotuLenh rules study plan

description: Use the review logic, piece-by-piece checklist, and mechanic review checklist from docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md to create a repeatable QA rubric for lesson authors and reviewers. The output should help future rule-doc or learn-lesson changes confirm that each piece, terrain rule, capture mode, blocking rule, air-defense interaction, deploy behavior, heroic rule, flying-general rule, and game-state concept is still covered coherently.
title: Turn the CotuLenh rules study plan into a reusable lesson QA checklist

description: Story 7.2 review noted remaining use of fixed setTimeout(50) waits in learn-progress-sync.test.ts. Replace with deterministic waitFor/event-driven assertions to reduce CI flakiness and speed up tests.

The warning persisted after removing AlertDialog Action/Cancel wrappers from the friends page, so the remaining source is elsewhere and should be traced and fixed.
